sentences.text: Say you run a small bakery and all you have online is an Instagram bio.
You want a proper homepage — something you can send people to.
You don't need a design, a template, or any technical setup.
You just describe it: "Build a one-page website for my bakery, Rosewood Bakes.
Warm and cozy, with our name, what we sell, our hours, and a way to get in touch."
